message:
refactor(interactive): expose model selector helpers as pub(crate) for testing (bd-4ma1)

Widen visibility of four internal model selector/cycling functions from
private to pub(crate) to enable unit test coverage in separate test files:

- strip_thinking_level_suffix(): parse thinking level from model patterns
- parse_scoped_model_patterns(): split comma/whitespace-separated patterns
- model_entry_matches(): case-insensitive model entry comparison
- resolve_scoped_model_entries(): resolve pattern strings to ModelEntry vec

Required by the model selector + scoped cycling test bead (bd-4ma1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
